title: Microsoft to layoff over 5,000 employees across teams

title: The AI power grab: How the race to build artificial intelligence is driving up your electricity bill
description: Rapid expansion of AI infrastructure is straining power grids, driving up household electricity costs and fuelling a political debate over who should pay for the energy transition.
content:
Artificial intelligence is no longer just transforming technology; it is reshaping electricity markets and increasing power bills for millions of Americans.

title: Anthropic joins AI race in healthcare with drug discovery program: What it is, everything else to know
description: Anthropic has entered the healthcare AI space with a drug discovery programme. The move adds it to a widening race to apply artificial intelligence in medicine.

title: Tech exports boost China’s June factory activity
description: HONG KONG -- China's factory activity picked up pace in June, an official survey showed Tuesday, as demand for artificial intelligence hardware made exports robust.
content:

title: AI companies urged to pay up or stay out of Australia
description: Australian news outlets are under threat from a growing number of hungry tech companies, including artificial intelligence firms which do not pay for content.

title: US Lifts Export Ban on Anthropic's Mythos, Fable
description: Washington has lifted export curbs on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI models less than three weeks after a national security suspension. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick confirmed special licences are no longer required, as Anthropic agrees to tighter risk monitoring and cooperation with US authorities amid growing scrutiny of advanced artificial intelligence.
